scores.notes: Minor issues include 'UPTIMEI INSTITUTE GLOBAL: SURVEY OFI IT AND DATA CENTERI MANAGERS: 2024' which has extra 'I' characters and a colon instead of a space. Also, 'energy.performance: for IT' has a period and colon instead of a space. The table structure is mostly good, but the alignment of the percentages could be slightly better for a perfect score. All numerical values are correct.
